# Module 4

Module 4 is the integrative assignment, bringing together the methods from earlier modules. The workshop wrap-up deck is also linked here.

## Lecture

- **Module 4 — Integrative Assignment (Constance Li):** [PDF](content-files/slides/PNA_CalSask-2605_Module4_Lecture.pdf) · [PPTX](content-files/slides/PNA_CalSask-2605_Module4_Lecture.pptx)
- **Workshop Wrap-up:** [PPTX](content-files/slides/PNA_CalSask-2605_Wrap-up.pptx)

## Lab

Lab slide deck:

- **Module 4 Lab:** [PDF](content-files/slides/PNA_CalSask-2605_Module4_Lab.pdf) · [PPTX](content-files/slides/PNA_CalSask-2605_Module4_Lab.pptx)

Lab materials (zipped — contains the input data for the integrative assignment):

- **Lab 4 — Integrative Assignment:** [Download Lab4.zip](content-files/labs/Lab4.zip)
